19.dv: from the same as H6889 (צֶרֶת) and H7837 (שַׁחַר) with the article interposed; splendor of the dawn;

19.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

19.kj: dale, vale, valley (often used as a part of proper names). See also H1025 (בֵּית הָעֵמֶק).

19.gl: Sebam or Sibmah, a place in Moab
19.dv: or (feminine) שִׂבְמָה; probably from H1313 (בָּשָׂם); spice;

19.gl: Kirjathaim, the name of two placed in Palestine

20.gl: Beth-ha-Jeshimoth, a town East of the Jordan
20.dv: from H1004 (בַּיִת) and the plural of H3451 (יְשִׁימַה) with the article interposed; house of the deserts;

20.gl: Beth-Peor, a place East of the Jordan
20.dv: from H1004 (בַּיִת) and H6465 (פְּעוֹר); house of Peor;

20.gl: Pisgah, a Mountain East of Jordan

21.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
21.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

21.gl: a level, i.e. a plain (often used (with the article prefix) as a proper name of certain districts); figuratively, concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) justice (sometimes adverbially, justly)
21.kj: equity, even place, plain, right(-eously), (made) straight, uprightness.

21.gl: to strike (lightly or severely, literally or figuratively)

21.gl: to reign; inceptively, to ascend the throne; causatively, to induct into royalty; hence (by implication) to take counsel
21.kj: consult, [idiom] indeed, be (make, set a, set up) king, be (make) queen, (begin to, make to) reign(-ing), rule, [idiom] surely.

21.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
21.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
21.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

21.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
21.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
21.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

22.gl: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity

33.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
33.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

33.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.
